Actions.Text: AMEND (T) AND RECOMMIT TO GOVERNMENTAL EMPLOYEES

Title: Authorizes Tina Russo to receive certain service credit with the New York state teachers' retirement system
Summary: Authorizes Tina Russo to receive certain service credit with the New York state teachers' retirement system.
ActClause: AN ACT in relation to authorizing Tina Russo to receive a recalculation of her retirement benefit from the New York state teachers' retirement system
